subcodes.first_line: From the infinite bounty of God hath appeared the springtime of knowledge. Blessed is the soul that hath adorned itself with the raiment of wisdom and [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual transformation, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God
